# place

**Instance Property**

A place name that commonly refers to the location.

## Declaration

```swift
var place: String?
```

## Identifying the location

- **city**: A name for the location if it’s inside a city.

items.description: A name for the location if it’s inside a city.
items.name: city

title: place
